---
title: "Greek Horiatiki Salad"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Salads"]
---

**Ingredients:**

-   5 large tomatoes

-   1 small red onion, thinly sliced

-   sea salt to taste

-   1 ½ teaspoons dried oregano

-   1 small green bell pepper, sliced (Optional)

-   ½ medium cucumber, sliced (Optional)

-   ¼ cup Greek black olives

-   3 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil

-   1 (8 ounce) package feta cheese

**Directions:**

1.  Cut tomatoes into wedges over a large serving bowl so that any extra
    juices land in the bowl with tomato wedges. Add onion slices and
    oregano, then season liberally with salt; mix to combine. Allow
    tomatoes to sit at room temperature until juices have released, at
    least 20 to 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.

2.  Mix in bell pepper, cucumber, and olives just before serving. Top
    with feta cheese and drizzle with olive oil.
